evals.prompt: Design a state machine for an e-commerce order lifecycle. States should include: draft, placed, payment_pending, payment_failed, confirmed, preparing, shipped, delivered, return_requested, returned, cancelled. Include guard conditions, side effects, a Mermaid diagram, and TypeScript implementation.
evals.expected_output: State table with descriptions and terminal flags, transition table with guards and side effects, Mermaid stateDiagram, TypeScript implementation with const enum + transition map, validation checklist

assertions.name: state_table
assertions.description: All 11 states listed in a table with descriptions and terminal flags

assertions.name: transition_table
assertions.description: Transition table with From, To, Trigger, Guard, and Side Effects columns

assertions.name: guard_conditions
assertions.description: Guard conditions defined (e.g., payment verified, items in stock)

assertions.name: side_effects
assertions.description: Side effects listed (e.g., send email, update inventory, create audit log)

assertions.name: mermaid_diagram
assertions.description: Mermaid stateDiagram-v2 showing all states and transitions

assertions.name: typescript_impl
assertions.description: TypeScript implementation using const enum + transition map pattern (not switch statements)

evals.prompt: Design a state machine for a hiring/recruitment pipeline. States: applied, resume_screening, phone_screen, technical_interview, onsite_interview, reference_check, offer_extended, offer_accepted, offer_declined, hired, rejected, withdrawn. Guards should include interviewer feedback scores (>= 3/5 to advance). Side effects: send emails, schedule calendar events, update ATS records.
evals.expected_output: State table with all 12 states, transitions with feedback score guards, side effects for emails and calendar, Mermaid diagram, TypeScript implementation

assertions.name: state_table
assertions.description: All 12 states listed with descriptions and terminal flags (hired, rejected, withdrawn, offer_declined)

assertions.name: transition_table
assertions.description: Transitions between interview stages with clear progression path

assertions.name: feedback_score_guards
assertions.description: Guards checking interviewer feedback score >= threshold to advance to next stage

assertions.name: side_effects_with_calendar
assertions.description: Side effects include scheduling calendar events for interviews

assertions.name: mermaid_diagram
assertions.description: Mermaid stateDiagram showing the full pipeline

assertions.name: typescript_implementation
assertions.description: TypeScript implementation using const enum + transition map pattern

evals.prompt: Design a state machine for a content publishing workflow. States: draft, in_review, revisions_requested, approved, scheduled, published, archived, unpublished. Guards: reviewer must have editor role, scheduled date must be in the future, only admin can unpublish. Side effects: notify author on status change, update search index on publish/unpublish, invalidate CDN cache.
evals.expected_output: State table, transitions with role-based guards, side effects for search index and CDN, Mermaid diagram, TypeScript implementation

assertions.name: state_table
assertions.description: All 8 states listed with terminal flags (archived as terminal or non-terminal based on design)

assertions.name: transition_table
assertions.description: Transitions covering review cycle (draft->review->revisions->draft loop)

assertions.name: role_based_guards
assertions.description: Guards checking user role (editor for review, admin for unpublish)

assertions.name: side_effects_with_cache
assertions.description: Side effects include CDN cache invalidation on publish/unpublish

assertions.name: mermaid_diagram
assertions.description: Mermaid diagram showing review loop and publish/archive flow

assertions.name: typescript_implementation
assertions.description: TypeScript using const enum + transition map

evals.prompt: Design a state machine for an invoice/payment lifecycle. States: created, sent, viewed, partial_payment, paid, overdue, disputed, refunded, written_off. Guards: payment amount must not exceed remaining balance, dispute must include reason text, refund only within 90 days. Side effects: send payment reminders for overdue, update accounting ledger, trigger collections workflow.
evals.expected_output: State table, transitions supporting partial payments, guards with amount validation, side effects for accounting, Mermaid diagram, TypeScript implementation

assertions.name: state_table
assertions.description: All 9 states with descriptions (partial_payment as non-terminal, paid/refunded/written_off as terminal)

assertions.name: partial_payment_transitions
assertions.description: Supports partial_payment -> partial_payment (additional payment) and partial_payment -> paid (final payment)

assertions.name: amount_validation_guard
assertions.description: Guard checking payment amount doesn't exceed remaining balance

assertions.name: side_effects_accounting
assertions.description: Side effects update accounting ledger or financial records on payment

assertions.name: mermaid_diagram
assertions.description: Mermaid diagram showing payment flow including partial payments

assertions.name: typescript_implementation
assertions.description: TypeScript with transition map pattern

evals.prompt: Design a state machine for a CI/CD deployment pipeline. States: queued, building, testing, staging_deploy, approval_pending, production_deploy, deployed, rolling_back, failed. Guards: all tests must pass to proceed to staging, approval from 2+ reviewers required for production, rollback only allowed from deployed or production_deploy states. Side effects: Slack notifications, GitHub deployment status updates, metric recording.
evals.expected_output: State table, transitions with test-pass and approval guards, side effects for Slack/GitHub, Mermaid diagram, TypeScript implementation

assertions.name: state_table
assertions.description: All 9 states with deployed and failed as terminal states

assertions.name: transition_table
assertions.description: Transitions from building->testing->staging->approval->production->deployed

assertions.name: test_pass_guard
assertions.description: Guard requiring all tests to pass before staging deployment

assertions.name: approval_guard
assertions.description: Guard requiring 2+ reviewer approvals for production deploy

assertions.name: rollback_constraints
assertions.description: Rollback transition only from deployed or production_deploy states

assertions.name: mermaid_diagram
assertions.description: Mermaid diagram showing the pipeline with failure and rollback paths

assertions.name: typescript_implementation
assertions.description: TypeScript implementation with const enum + transition map
